name: Corn Fritter Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add ingredients to Automatic Bread Machine according to manufacturer's instructions.
2. This recipe is suitable for regular and rapid bake cycles.
3. Ensure canned corn is drained well before measuring.
4. The dough will not be as firm during the kneading process as you are used to; this is normal.
5. For fried corn fritters, use the dough cycle:
a. Roll the dough out into a one-inch thickness.
b. Slice the dough into one-inch cubes.
c. Heat oil in a frying pan for the fritters to sizzle immediately when added.
d. Cook the fritters for approximately one minute, stirring occasionally.
e. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
